entry.title: S/4HANA cloud extensibility instance creation failed
entry.content:
Hi All,

We tried with two different JSONs to create the S/4HANA cloud extensibility instance in BTP and both of them are showing the same error:

Default JSON with emClientId and systemName.

And this JSON from this blog 

 

 

{
"options": {
"management": true,
"messagingrest": true,
"messaging": true
},
"rules": {
"topicRules": {
"inboundFilter": [
"${namespace}/#"
]
}
},
"emname": "S4P",
"namespace": "sap/S4HANAOD/S4P"
}

entry.title: Re: Enable events from S/4HANA cloud to Event Mesh
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog. But when I the JSON descriptor to create S/4HANA cloud extensibility instance I got this error:

The following communication arrangement additional attributes are invalid: CHANNEL NAME, DESCRIPTION, TOPIC SPACE, MQTT_QOS, RECONNECT ATTEMPTS, WAIT TIME...

I also removed them and kept the default JSON with only emClientId and systemName ( Which are the only required attributes based on SAP's documentation) but still facing the same issue !!

Any idea how to fix it ?

entry.title: Key Highlights from the 2H 2024 Release of Performance and Goals Management
entry.content:
Hi Community,

The 2H 2024 release is here!

A new set of enhancements has been released in the 2H 2024 release that has been eagerly awaited. The SAP SuccessFactors 2H 2024 Release includes some key features and enhancements, so let's take a closer look!

1- AI-Assisted Skill Recommendations from Continuous Performance Management Data:

Talent Intelligence Hub can now use AI-assisted capabilities to infer and recommend skills to employees in their Growth Portfolio using Continuous Performance Management data.

When an employee enters details in the achievements, activities, or feedback section in Continuous Performance Management, this feature infers skills based on the employee's inputs.

Enablement: Contact Customer Engagement Executive or Account Manager

Configuration Requirements:

  • Purchase the AI units. For more information, please contact your Account Executive.
  • Enable the Assisted Skill Recommendations Using Continuous Performance Management Data setting in the AI Services Administration page.
  • Upgrade to Talent Intelligence Hub.
  • Enable Continuous Performance Management.

Role-Based Permission Prerequisites:

  • Administrators have the Administrator Manage AI Capabilities AI Services Administration permission.
  • Enable User>AI Access>Assisted Skill Recommendations Using Continuous Performance Management Data permission.

2- Automatic Channel Creation for Matrix Relationships Now Supported in Continuous Performance Management:

You can now enable the automatic creation of channels between matrix managers and matrix reports to reduce manual effort.
This option is by default unchecked. By enabling it, each pair of matrix manager and matrix report will have a 1:1 channel automatically created. If they already have a channel, no additional ones will be created for them. On the Continuous Performance page, these channels will be grouped into two new categories: Matrix Managers and Matrix Reports.

Enablement: Customer Configured

Configuration Requirements:

  • Enable Multiple Role Support in Continuous Performance Management Configuration Page.
  • Enable matrix managers and matrix reports to be shown as people selections for Channels by default in Continuous Performance Management Configuration Page.

3- Link and Unalign Goals:

In the latest Goal Management, users can now link their performance goals with another user’s goals or unaligned goals as needed.

Users can link goals using either of the following ways:

  • In their goal plan, choose the Link Goal option on a goal card and follow the on-screen instructions.
  • Go to another user's goal plan, choose the Link with Mine option on a goal card, and complete the linking steps.

Once goals are linked, an alignment relationship is established and displayed in the goal alignment chart. Users can also unalign goals using the Unalign Goal option on the goal card. This option is available for goals that were previously linked or cascaded in their goal plan.

Enablement: Contact Product Support

Configuration Requirements:

  • The latest Goal Management is enabled.
  • To link goals, users are granted the cascade-align permission in the goal plan template.
  • To unalign goals, users are granted the unalign-parent or unalign-child permission in the goal plan template, depending on their roles.

4- Bulk Channel Invitations Now Supported in Continuous Performance Management:

Users can now send bulk invitations for 1:1 meeting channels in the Continuous Performance page.

Enablement: Automatically on

5- Enhancements to AI-Assisted Goal Creation:

Several enhancements to AI-assisted goal creation in the latest Goal Management. 

  • Updated AI tag: On the goal creation page, the tag for fields with content generated by AI is now "AI-generated content", replacing the previous "AI-enhanced content".
  • Streamlined content comparison: The Compare Generated Content page has been removed, making the process more efficient by eliminating the step where users had to choose between two versions of goal content. Instead, the AI-assisted writing tool is now in place to enhance content directly at the field level.
  • Improved prompt template: The prompt template is now optimized to automatically apply goal plan configurations, such as start, due, and maxlength, to AI-generated goals.
  • Support for custom fields: Custom fields of text and textarea types are now supported for performance goals. By providing meaningful text for <field-description>, you specify the context, which in turn helps improve the quality of AI-generated content. This ensures that the AI can generate more accurate and relevant suggestions for your goals.

Enablement: Contact Customer Engagement Executive or Account Manager

Configuration Requirements:

  • The latest Goal Management is enabled.
  • You've purchased the AI units license. For more information about AI units license, contact your Account Executive.
  • AI-assisted goal creation is enabled and properly configured.
  • For custom fields of text and textarea types, meaningful text for <field-description> is configured in the goal plan template.

6- Delegation Available for Performance Reviews:

The most awaited feature of Performance Review is finally here. With the delegation feature, users, usually managers, can delegate their performance review tasks to other people within a specified time period. It also allows administrators to create delegations on behalf of managers.

Enablement: Customer Configured

Configuration Requirements:

  • Enable Delegation Feature in the Company System and Logo Settings admin tool.

7- Enhanced AI-Assisted Writing in 360 Reviews:

AI-assisted writing tool to help generate comments and improve feedback.

  • Improve My Feedback: Available when there is text selected, this item assists users in providing clear, concise, and professional comments that are pertinent to a specific skill or competency and its rating. Users can view the improved feedback or evaluate multiple attempts in a separate dialog before applying a result.

  • Generate Comments: Available when no text is selected, this item suggests six topics dynamically based on the rating assigned to the current competency or skill. Users can choose one topic and let the tool generate detailed comments relevant to the competency or skill and its rating, without needing users to provide initial text input. Users can further edit the comments manually or with the help of the tool. Previously, users had to enter some content for the tool to expand or otherwise process.

Enablement: Contact Customer Engagement Executive or Account Manager

Configuration Requirements:

  • Purchase the AI units license. For more information about the AI units license, please contact your Account Executive.
  • Enable the AI Services Administration>Assisted Writing with Text Analyzer option in the Admin Center.
  • Consented to the AI Usage Acknowledgment Statement.

Role-Based Permission Prerequisites:

  • Administrator Manage AI Capabilities>AI Services Administration permission.
  • Employees have the User Permissions>AI Access>Assisted Writing with Text Analyzer permission.

8- Custom Learning Supported on 360 Reviews Forms:

With the latest Goal Management enabled, users can now add, edit, or delete custom learning activities on 360 Reviews forms.

Enablement: Customer Configured

Configuration Requirements:

  • The latest Goal Management is enabled.
  • In Manage Templates, the form template is configured to show the Development Goal section.
  • The form has a development goal plan linked to it, and the plan contains a learning activity template, based on which custom learning activities are created.

9- AI-Assisted Insights into Detailed 360 Report:

Leveraging generative AI capabilities, users can gain synthesized insights from participant feedback, both overall and for individual skills or competencies.

The generative AI in the Detailed 360 Report can be used in two scenarios:

  • Overall understanding of a Detailed 360 Report
  • Consolidated analysis of a specific skill or competency

Enablement: Contact Customer Engagement Executive or Account Manager

Configuration Requirements:

  • Purchase the AI units license. For more information about the AI units license, please contact your Account Executive.
  • Enable the AI Services Administration>Assisted 360 Reviews option.
  • Enable the 360 Reviews – SAP Fiori Version - requires "360 Multi-Rater" and the Graphical Report (360) - requires "360 Multi-Rater" options in Provisioning.
  • You've consented to the AI Usage Acknowledgment Statement.

Role-Based Permission Prerequisites:

  • Administrators have the Administrator Manage AI Capabilities>AI Services Administration permission.
  • Employees have the User>AI Access>Assisted 360 Reviews permission. They also have permission to view a Detailed 360 Report.

For a detailed release summary, check out the “What’s New Viewer” for a list of enhancements across the application.

entry.title: How to find out who deleted a Performance, Recruiting or Compensation form
entry.content:
The feature we can use for this purpose is called Detailed Document Search and it is not going to be retired with the current migration to People Analytics.

Please see recording with step by step here: 

https://youtu.be/PQ9gFusJanw

 

All the best,

Xavier

(If you found this content helpful please consider giving it a Kudo)

entry.title: Dimensional Weight Profile with Normalized Quantities (NLQ)
entry.content:
Dear TM community,

we have an agreement with a freight forwarder that 1 loading meter is charged with at least 1500 kg weight.

We need to compare the real weight with the volume weight. The higher of both is the chargeable weight.

With the feature to work with normalized and additional normalized quantities (NLQ / ALQ), we can bring the "loading meter" information into the FU/FO and of course into the FSD. Rate Determination Based on Normalized and Additional Normalized Quantities | SAP Help Portal

But the "Dimensional weight profile" which is actually used for the calculation of the volume weight covers only the volume of the FU, not the ALQ.

I need to calculate in my example: 

  • 1 EPL = 0,4 LDM 
  • 0,4 LDM x 1500 kg = 600 kg
  • Real weight: 210 kg
  • Chargeable weight: 600 kg
  • The factor (1500 kg) can be different per forwarding agency.

Did I miss anything in SAP that could meet this requirement in the standard? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: FSCM - Credit Limit Requests Approval using Manage Credit Management Rules
entry.content: Thanks Darrel for the direction, also found one of the note  3349357 and SAP is saying to create whole new set of config with case type FCLR, will keep you guys posted.

entry.title: I am creating a batch using the FM BAPI_BATCH_SAVE_REPLICA .Internal object number empty .
entry.content: I am creating batches using BAPI_BATCH_SAVE_REPLICA .In some cases the internal object number is not updated .Can you let me know what are teh cases the internal object number is not populated and can we use different FM

entry.title: Re: Typing a value doesn't show any value from dropdown i...
entry.content:
Yes, sure.

 

<itemtype code="ItemTypeA">
    <attributes>
        <attribute qualifier="myAttributeB" type="ItemTypeB">
            <persistence type="property" />
        </attribute>
    </attributes>
</itemtype>

 

<context type="ItemTypeA" component="advanced-search" merge-by="type" >   
      <as:advanced-search xmlns:as="http://www.hybris.com/cockpitng/config/advancedsearch" connection-operator="AND" disable-auto-search="true">      
          <as:field-list>         
               ...         
               <as:field name="myAttributeB" operator="equals" selected="true"/>      
          </as:field-list>   
      </as:advanced-search></context>

entry.title: Dynamic programming fail: pass table TYPE cds as a parameter
entry.content:
Dear experts,

this is driving me mad.

I have several calling programs, which calls one wanna-be generic and reusable class. That class is supposed to select data from different CDS view entities and process them. Therefore I need to let the class know what CDS it is supposed to work with. I thought it would be easy but I could not be more wrong.

 

If it is not possible, I would be happy to know why.
Thank you.
Denis
btw - posting a question here is almost that impossible as what I am trying to achieve with ABAP.  Isn't that symptomatic?

 

"Call from the main program
************** DEFINITION OF THE STRUCTURE FOR DATA FROM CDS **************

  DATA: t_data_obs TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF zfi_data_obs.  " Internal table for passing the CDS structure to the class


************** INSTANTIATION AND CALLING THE CLASS **************
  DATA: go_consumer     TYPE REF TO zfi_obs_interface_consumer.
  TRY.
      CREATE OBJECT go_consumer
        EXPORTING
          i_where_cond     = where_clause
          i_t_code         = 'ZFI_SEND_PAYMENTS'
          i_cds_view       = 'ZFI_DATA_OBS'
          i_t_data_obs     = t_data_obs
          i_wholedoc       = abap_true  " in transaction ZFI_SEND_PAYMENTS always true, only a whole document can be sent to OBS
          i_hotspot_column = 'DocumentNumber'. " CDS field name for hotspot in ALV
    CATCH cx_static_check INTO DATA(lx_error_static).
      MESSAGE lx_error_static->get_text( ) TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.
  
  go_consumer->get_data( ).


" Constructor declaration and implementation, private attributes:
METHODS: constructor IMPORTING i_where_cond     TYPE string "where condition from the calling program
                                   i_t_code         TYPE tcode  "calling transaction
                                   i_t_data_obs     TYPE ANY TABLE
                                   i_cds_view       TYPE string "CDS view entity for selecting data
                                   i_wholedoc       TYPE abap_bool "transfer a complete document only?
                                   i_hotspot_column TYPE string
                                   "me->t_items      = VALUE zfi_data_obs( ).
                         RAISING   cx_static_check.

PRIVATE SECTION.
    " Instance variables.
    DATA: where_cond     TYPE string,
          t_code         TYPE tcode,
          cds_view       TYPE string,
          t_items        TYPE REF TO data,
          wholedoc       TYPE abap_bool,
          hotspot_column TYPE char30,
          o_alv          TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
          o_events       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_events_table,
          lx_error       TYPE REF TO cx_root.

CLASS ZFI_OBS_INTERFACE_CONSUMER IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD constructor.
    cds_view   = i_cds_view.
    where_cond = i_where_cond.
    hotspot_column = i_hotspot_column.
    
    t_items = i_t_data_obs.
    
*  CREATE DATA t_items LIKE i_t_data_obs.
*  FIELD-SYMBOLS: <fs_items> TYPE STANDARD TABLE.
*  ASSIGN t_items->* TO <fs_items>.
*  <fs_items> = i_t_data_obs.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD get_data.
    SELECT * FROM (cds_view) WHERE (where_cond) INTO TABLE @t_items. " Dynamic select from CDS
    me->t_items = t_items.
    me->prepare_alv( ).

  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: SAP CAL Appliance Activation for Business One 10 on GCP GCP-SAP B1 CAL Appliance Activation issue
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, and want to run SAP Business One Hana on Google Cloud using SAP CAL. 

I could setup Trial GCP account. Also create SAP B1 Appliance in the console https://cal.sap.com/console Using documentation guideline https://help.sap.com/doc/aafe85d6161942d794af0adfee96fbac/10.0/en-US/SAP_Business_One_on_SAP_CAL.pdf 

Appliance got prepared in SAP console and shows the VM config. Whistle trying to activate it, it gives following error: 

“

Failed Operation

Start

On Step

Check Quotas

Cloud Provider

Google Cloud Platform

Message

Usage limits reached:

Regional:

- Quota 'N2_CPUS' exceeded. Available: 8, Requested: 20

 

To solve this problem you have to request additional quota from the Quotas page in the GCP console.

 

=

 

Note, no VM was created in GCP during the process. As there is no VM in GCP but only in SAP CAL console, so how can I increase N2_CPUS value in GCP?

Can someone help me here to getting me SAP B1 to run successfully using GCP trial / free account? 

Highly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: GL Acc. Balance not equal to total line items
entry.content: Thanks so much for the detailed explanation.. it helped me in my analysis

entry.title: SAP Business One Cloud Account Subscription
entry.content: Dear SAP Community. I'm new to SAP learning and need SAP Business One Ver 10 VM access for about 2 months for my self learning. Hope someone here can help me with. I'm ready to subscribe. Or can possibly assist me on Zoom with Activating my SAP B1 Appliance in SAP CAL to work with GCP Trial account. Thanks so much.

entry.title: Re: Typing a value doesn't show any value from dropdown i...
entry.content:
I think it's working. I have:

 

<itemtype code="ItemTypeA">
    <attributes>
        <attribute qualifier="myAttributeB" type="ItemTypeB">
            <persistence type="property" />
        </attribute>
    </attributes>
</itemtype>

 

 

 

<context type="ItemTypeA" component="advanced-search" merge-by="type" >   
      <as:advanced-search xmlns:as="http://www.hybris.com/cockpitng/config/advancedsearch" connection-operator="AND" disable-auto-search="true">      
          <as:field-list>         
               ...         
               <as:field name="myAttributeB" operator="equals" selected="true"/>      
          </as:field-list>   
      </as:advanced-search></context>

 

 I want to search "myAttributeB" by "name" in advanced search of ItemType A. After adding simple search by "name" for ItemTypeB, now when I type the name of myAttributeB in advanced-search, I can see it displaying.

 

	<context type="ItemTypeB" component="simple-search" merge-by="type">
		<simple-search:simple-search>
			<simple-search:field name="name" />
		</simple-search:simple-search>
	</context>

 

 Thank you so much for your help!

entry.title: Re: Typing a value doesn't show any value from dropdown i...
entry.content: Thank you for your help! After I added simple-search for ItemTypeB, now I seem to be able to search it in advanced search of itemTypeA.

entry.title: Re: Typing a value doesn't show any value from dropdown i...
entry.content: Hey, I added simple-search and it seems to work. You can give it a try.

entry.title: Re: Typing a value doesn't show any value from dropdown in Advanced Search BackOffice
entry.content: Hey, I added simple-search and it seems to work. You can give it a try.

entry.title: CPI Message Mapping Issue with Simulate
entry.content:
Hi,
I am facing the blank output when Simulating the Message Mapping. 

I am simulating the message mapping by uploading the xml file. The source fields gets populated after uploading of the file but when I click on the Test button, The target side is blank. 
Message shows that the mapping is successful but the output side turn out to be blank.
I would like your guidance on the same.  

Please refer to the screenshot attached below.


Thankyou.

 

SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client librariesSAP Integration Suite 
@Sriprasadsbhat @daviddasilva @gautham_krishna

entry.title: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT during Validation on Save
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are using SAP standard function module "COBL_CODINGBLOCK_CHECK" in custom ABAP RAP application to validate the accounting lines, but application gets crashed during the validation phase with error saying BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT.

Statement "EXPORT TO DATABASE" is not allowed with this status.

Actually, function module "COBL_CODINGBLOCK_CHECK" internally calls the function module “FM_ACCOUNT_DERIVE” which tries to save the fund management derivation rule (FMDERIVE) trace log in data cluster (TABADRX) using statement "EXPORT TO DATABASE".

We know that database commands are not allowed in RAP Early Save Phase and only allowed in RAP Late Save Phase.

We can perform coding block check during RAP Late Save Phase, but then error messages would not be shown in UI, so it must be done in RAP Early Save Phase.

Do you have any suggestion how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Reporte de Listado Picking
entry.content:
Estimados compañeros su ayuda necesito crear un reporte donde me saque el listado de PICKING de SAP pero la única diferencia es que necesito que ese reporte sea consolidado es decir que Ejemplo listado PICKING 11 tengo varios articulo de diferentes facturas y diferentes cliente lo que necesito es sacar el total de cada articulo es decir que en una sola linea me apares ca el articulo ya sumado de todos y así en todos los artículos  

ahorita no me sirve el reporte que me da SAP nativamente xq me saca individual una linea por articulo lo que necesito es en que una sola linea me salga el total de ese articulo en cantidad vendida ….necesito este reporte mas por el tema de despacho ya que ahorita estamos realizando manualmente una factura a la vez y sumando en cada factura que artículos ahí y cuanto de cantidad para el despacho lo que nos quita tiempo lo que necesitamos es un consolidado del total de cada artículo vendido facturado pero utilizando el listado de PICKING por favor si me tienen alguna duda me pregunta

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content:
I’m excited to share that after completing the activities for Week 1(14650) and Week 2 (15970), I achieved a 100% score (30620/30620) on the scoreboard and reached Level 4!

I’m thrilled about this accomplishment. I dedicated extra time beyond my office hours and learned so much from each tutorial, which will greatly enhance my ability to support my clients and advance my career.

I’m eagerly looking forward to the next contest (Week 3) to continue learning.

A special thank you to the SAP global team, and a heartfelt thanks to Thomas Jung for patiently addressing all my questions during the contests.

Thanks,
Vishala.

entry.content:
In Adobe form i have a field Dunning level in table for which i am getting numrical value if the value is 0 i want to display it as blank (Space only ) how can i handle this in SAP adobe forms.

Thanks

entry.title: How do you batch-delete line items from a Sales or Template Bill of Material within SAP B1?
entry.content:
We have many sales and template Bill of Materials that we maintain.

The question has come up - how do you batch-delete line items from a Sales or Template Bill of Materials for products in which are out of stock and are discontinued?

We have BOYUM and I use Master Data Manager for a few different things and I was hoping that I could use this as well for this circumstance - but I'm not sure that you can?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I identify as the following:

  • Women
  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location 
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life
  • People who lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt for themselves

I am interested in the Digital Skills Initiative and ready to take the next steps towards becoming certified.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Best Practices PP Module
entry.content: Thank you for your reply Please let me know the frequently used scope item IDs in the related best practices.

entry.title: Re: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT during Validation on Save
entry.content:
create a class implementing if_abap_parallel

you can do the validation there.

entry.title: Re: Red/Yellow Flags of Stock Room Management Compatibili...
entry.content: Hi Shrikanth, To your subsequent questions ("Are we obliged to turn these into green from SAP audit point of view"), you are not obligated by SAP to get all greens on this report. The report is informational and intended to provide you guidance on where you may be out of compliance with using Stock Room Management in S/4HANA after the Compatibility Pack timeframe end (December 2025). I don't recommend to ignore the indications given, however - you should do the due diligence to ensure these components are not used, as the components would first be "end of use license" and then in any version after EOY 2025, the functionality could be technically deprecated and could cause problems in your system if any of the functionality is being used (even in any customizations). More information is provided in OSS 2881166 (https://me.sap.com/notes/2881166/E) and other related notes.

entry.title: Data append from one database to another
entry.content:
We have two development systems.

We need to add/append data from original system to target system, without removing the data already present in target system.

We are using SAP ECC 6 EHP7 on oracle 19c as the database on AIX 7.2.

Can you please let us know any steps or process for this requirement.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Data append from one database to another
entry.content: if this is table structure change, for example, add columns, we have to use transport function.

The auntie that once was SAP*'s girlfriend is still going strong

I've just seen her sneaking arround in the client 000 of a RISE system 🤣

entry.title: SAP TechEd 2024 - Você já conhece as trilhas de conteúdos ?
entry.content:
O SAP TechEd 2024 ocorrerá nos dias 08 e 09 de Outubro de 2024. 

E para orientar os usuários a ter um melhor aproveitamento dos conteúdos, a SAP disponibilizou trilhas de conteúdo. E cada trilha de conteúdo abrange um amplo espectro de produtos e soluções SAP, em formatos de sessão adaptados às suas necessidades.

Elas são:

🔵(DT) Digital Transformation with Cloud ERP

O SAP S/4HANA Cloud oferece suporte à transformação digital com soluções para todas as necessidades. Não importa se você está adotando seu primeiro ERP ou migrando de um existente, saiba por que o SAP S/4HANA Cloud oferece uma solução completa e modular com a IA e a análise necessárias para levar seu negócio adiante.

🔴(XP) SAP Business Technology Platform – General
Obtenha uma visão geral das principais tecnologias que compõem a plataforma, saiba como começar, ouça sobre orientações e práticas recomendadas e aprenda a operar e integrar seus aplicativos com segurança.

⚫(AD) Application Development and Automation

Aprenda a usar soluções SAP Build, infundidas com IA, para desenvolver aplicativos full-stack, automações e espaços de trabalho digitais. Acelere a modernização do ERP, promova a inovação e simplifique a automação, mantendo o núcleo limpo.

🟠 (DA) Data and Analytics

Obtenha acesso contínuo a dados empresariais de missão crítica, não importa onde eles estejam. Crie soluções que dão propósito aos dados, ao mesmo tempo em que simplificam o cenário de dados com tecido de dados empresariais, planejamento e análise estendidos e aplicativos de dados inteligentes.

🟢 (IN) Integration

Integre e automatize processos de negócios, APIs e eventos em aplicativos SAP e não SAP usando o SAP Integration Suite. Acelere a inovação com recursos assistidos por IA e harmonize experiências em diversos cenários.

⚪(AI) Artificial Intelligence
Descubra como inovações como Joule, nosso copiloto de IA generativa e modelos de linguagem grande estão transformando todas as áreas de negócios. Ouça como a IA pode aprimorar a tomada de decisões e a agilidade, ao mesmo tempo em que entrega resultados tangíveis.

Qual será seu caminho ? DT, XP, AD ... ?

Abraço,

Luiz Carlos de Souza

entry.title: Re: I have disabled CSRF under https adapter still gettin...
entry.content:
Hi Siva, check this link https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/oauth-setup-for-cloud-integration-in-cloud-foundry-environment/ba-p/13464170

And follow the steps!

Regards,

entry.title: CPI - PGP Encryption issue
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am facing a strange issue when trying to PGP encrypt the file using the standard pallete.I have used it in other scenarios and works fine but in this case =, the receiver application complains there is NO key associated with the message.

This is strange because we use the standard functionality and it should work as is.I have attached the PGP Key store,Iflow config and the error message.No signing is used as instructed by the receiver.

 

Any pointers will be great and if we have any links to custom  scripts to achieve this as well will be great to check and verify

entry.title: Re: 分类账视图与分录视图为何不同?
entry.content:
Hi Fang,

这是由于S/4HANA Cloud默认会激活凭证分割功能（此功能无法被取消），系统会默认根据利润中心进行分割，实现按照利润中心出示报表的需求。

可以参考链接进一步了解功能详情。

另外，如果对这个分割有异议，可以提交新的功能需求到网站

This is due to the fact that the document split feature is activated by default in S/4HANA Cloud (which cannot be cancelled), the system will split by profit center by default to enable reporting by profit center.

You can refer to the links to learn more about the feature details.

Also, if you disagree with this split, you can submit new functional requirements to the website

entry.title: Re: Hierarchy Type FSV not available in Global Hierarchies
entry.content:
Hello,

the reason you had to do the conversion is FSVs defined in Define Financial Statement Versions (Classic OB58) is different and stored in different database tables than FSVs define in Manage Global Hierarchies.

Q2P is term more often refers to internal testing system, where there can only one client, Sandbox or testing system client. in customer use cases, Q2P should always be active, there is no setting to turn it off. there is always Quality system connected to P system( 2SL), or D system, Q system and P system(3SL).

As for FSVs maintenance in Global Hierarchies, unfortunately, it has to be maintained in Q and transported to P. refer to Manage Global Hierarchies | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Batch number not getting copied in Return order
entry.content:
Hi,

You can also check SAP Notes：77414

entry.title: Re: 分类账视图与分录视图为何不同?
entry.content:
Dear,

分录视图：显示录入凭证的内容和行项目。

分类账视图：显示的是基于账套的行项目和信息。

这两个视图显示的信息来源于不同的底表结构，最直观的例子是应收和应付的凭证，分录视图显示的是客户和供应商， 分录账视图显示的是应收和应付总账科目。

看到的拆分是SAP的凭证拆分的功能，在公有云是无法取消激活的。

参考文档 Document Splitting Process

entry.title: Re: Can you delete a G/L account in Quality System S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi Marcus,

The G/L accounts can be deleted in cloud , please refer to 'implementation status' feature in S/4HANA Cloud to meet your requirement. Also you can refer to link to unstand the design logic and product help for how to use it.

Br, Bob

entry.title: Re: Message no. R1228 is displayed when entering identica...
entry.content: Hi, we are getting that error message when trying to finish the validity period of bank no longer active using valid to date as of Today (date when the new entry is made) and the new bank details are entered with valid from 'Today + 1'and would like to understand

entry.title: Re: Message no. R1228 is displayed when entering identical bank details
entry.content: Hi, we are getting that error message when trying to finish the validity period of bank no longer active using valid to date as of Today (date when the new entry is made) and the new bank details are entered with valid from 'Today + 1'. Is there something we are missing in this process? We would like to understand how to avoid the error message, just to be precise we are using BAPI_BP_MAINTAIN when this happens so wonder if there is an issue with this BAPI

entry.title: Unlock the Power of SAP HCM GenAI: Discover Use Cases, Pre-requisites, and RBP Requirements
entry.content:
There's a lot of chatter about SAP Business AI and how it's shaking up the HRTech space, especially when it comes to HCM AI use cases. If you're headed to SuccessConnect Lisbon—or tuning in virtually—trust me, you don’t want to miss some of the awesome sessions lined up! But before you get there, let me share a sneak peek of what we're cooking up in the world of HCM AI.

So, what is SAP Business AI exactly?

In a nutshell, it's our way of making business apps a whole lot smarter by sprinkling in AI magic. Think of it like this: Joule, our AI copilot, doesn’t just understand commands—it actually gets your business. And that’s not all. We’ve also got AI services tailored to specific business processes built on our BTP platform, like document processing, data recommendations, and even robotic process automation (RPA)—just to name a few.

 And we're not doing this alone! We're teaming up with some big players in the industry. In some cases, we’re embedding their tech right into our products—like what we’re doing with Microsoft. In others, we’re making it easy for our customers to build their own custom ML models using SAP data—securely, of course.

Let’s talk about types of AI use cases in SuccessFactors

and why SAP Business AI is your secret sauce for a smarter HR strategy.

First up, Relevant Integration: our AI is embedded right into your HCM data, so when it generates a job description, it’s tailored to the actual skills you need—not a cookie-cutter list. Next, Reliable Expertise: we’re not just tossing AI into the mix and hoping for the best. Our prompts are carefully crafted, tested at scale, and designed to give you the most accurate responses every time. Lastly, Responsible AI: We take ethics, data privacy, and bias seriously. Plus, we’ve got hyperscaler agreements to keep everything on the up and up. Because, let’s face it, AI without responsibility is like a car with no brakes—it's not going to end well.

Here’s a breakdown of HCM AI types available with the SuccessFactors suite:

 To summarize, here's an overview of the key AI use cases within SuccessFactors Suite. We will focus on GenAI HCM Use cases in this Blog.

Process to enable HCM GenAI Features

 

How do you enable GenAI use cases in your instance? There's plenty of info scattered across the PDC and customer community, but let me give you a quick, high-level overview to simplify things!!

 After purchasing AI units (step #2), the Ops Provisioning team activates AI services on their end, which then enables two switches in SuccessFactors Provisioning (step #3):

  • Enable AI-assisted HCM Content Generator
  • Enable AI-Assisted HXM Skills

    NOTE: Once these switches are activated, Admins will be able to see the 'AI Services Administration' role in Role-Based Permissions (RBP). If, for any reason, you're unable to see the AI services transactions after purchasing AI units, you can reach out to SF_Provisioning@sap.com for assistance.

    A key point to remember, users leveraging any GenAI feature must have RBP access to the relevant module.

    SAP Business AI Use Cases for HCM

    Here's a list of Premium AI use cases in SuccessFactors.

    Link to: Premium AI Features in SAP SuccessFactors

    Use CaseSuccessFactors Solution Pre-requisites

    Joule Actions

    Dependent on underlying actions – documented here

    See Guide to Activate Joule in SuccessFactors

      • Joule Order, i.e., Joule SKU (no cost SKU)
      • BTP Global Account & Subaccount for Joule provisioning
      • SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition for navigation service
      • SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS & IPS)

    Joule Assisted Q&A Capability

    See Document Grounding L0 Deck & SAP AI Services List

      • Steps as above with Joule Actions
      • Document Grounding AI Service
      • Document Specifications
        • Data Repository - MS SharePoint | Doc Formats - PDF and MS Word
        • Content - plain text | Language - English only

    AI Person Insights for Compensation Discussions

    SuccessFactors Compensation, SuccessFactors Employee Central

    AI Assisted Job Descriptions (Enhancing Job Descriptions with AI)

    SuccessFactors Recruiting (note: this feature works for customers using JDM or JPB)

    AI Assisted Interview Questions with MS Teams

    SuccessFactors Recruiting, MS Teams, SuccessFactors App for Microsoft Teams

    AI Assisted Goals Generation (Performance Goals and Development Goals

    Performance Management, Goals Management

    AI Assisted Skills Matching for Applicant Screening

    SuccessFactors Recruiting

    AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation

    Job Profile Builder, Talent Intelligence Hub

    AI Assisted Writing

    Relevant SuccessFactors modules (available in select modules today & availability will expand through 2025).

     

Here's a list of key configuration steps and RBP permissions for each of these use cases. I hope this information is helpful.

 

 

As always, pulling together these product details is a team effort—it truly takes a village! Huge thanks to my amazing colleagues Robert Wood and Davis Dudchock, our Product leads for HCM Business AI. If you're looking for more insights on SAP HCM Business AI use cases or Joule, join us at SuccessConnect in Lisbon Ask SAP experts: AI for HR (ASK100). You won’t want to miss it!

If you are unable to attend SC Lisbon, you can attend SuccessConnect Virtual, and there are many AI-related sessions. Registration for the virtual event is free.

entry.title: How to Integrate Third Party Ticketing Tool to SAP S/4HANA system to Move Transports in tool itself
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support Team,


As of now we are using solution manager for Transport Request moment through Charm. Now Our organization New ticketing tool for managing Incidents, Service Requests and Change management.


Now if want to Integrate with SAP S/4HANA system to move transport request between DEV-->QAS--> PRD systems. is it possible same like CHARM. 


And also please provide if any API is their to Integrate with Ticketing tool and move the Transport Request from DEV-->QAS-->PRD systems. with Change management Based on approval process without logging into SAP system and move the TRs in tool itself.


Please help on this.


Is it possible to Integrate and Move the Transport requests from DEV-->QAS-->PRD systems.


If possible, Pelase provide APIs need to use Integrate with S/4HANA STMS setup in Ticketing tool. 


Thanks,


Madhu.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Integrate Third Party Ticketing Tool to SAP S/...
entry.content:
Hi Madhu,

Regarding your concern, it is actually consulting questions, from standard product support perspective, we don't have such knowledge and experience yet. Kindly involve consulting service team for the specific project requirement.

BR,

Shawn

entry.title: SAC table add/remove dimension members via Script
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

The user wants that in a table some columns (account members) show hidden and if the user wants with a button this members shows

He wants the Excel Group/Ungroup functionality. (see picture)

Accounts are not in hierarchy and Account D is a calculation 

So the user wants to be able to view Account A,B,C and D or only D 

If you could give some example of script to achieve this I will be very grateful

Thanks in advance

entry.title: SAC Live Connection to SAP HANA using SSO auto Logon
entry.content:
Hi, currently using SSO Authentication for my Live Connection from SAC to SAP HANA. Everything work perfectly except the one thing: The SAP HANA XS auto log off after I restart my computer or after a day, and I need to log in again( image below). How can I config HANA XS never log out (session time out = never) ? Because I share the report for other 50 people in my company, and each people has his/her own SAC account corresponding to a HANA account (because I use a Live Connection so the only way to data authentication is in HANA instead of in SAC). And I don't want to provide password of HANA to user because of sensitive so I want to setup the logon HANA XS once for each user, so that every time they view the report, the logon session still there.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hi David,

My name is Hop.

Thanks for providing opportunity to start career in SAP with great initiative.

I identify as a person in the below categories:

2.  People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I'm currently studying the SAP FI module. Since I want to transition to a career as an SAP consultant without prior experience in the field, I'm aiming to earn an SAP certification to strengthen my case with potential employers
Please accept my registration.

Thank you
Hop

entry.title: Re: Synchronisation of processes between SAP Signavio and...
entry.content: Thanks @ManuelTae, will do.

entry.title: Order type of the sales order created with solution order
entry.content:
Hi, Expert！

When creating a sales order from Solution Order, I want to create the order type as OR instead of SOR.
When I checked the SAP Help Portal, I found the following solution:
　”Raise a ticket to activate the creation of changeable sales orders of type OR (standard orders). ”

I have two questions about this:

1) How can I change the order type from SOR to OR? Please tell me in detail.

2)What is meant by "ticket" in the SAP help portal? How do I create a ticket?  

Soma

entry.content:
Dear Community Learners,

Next week from Tuesday 15th Oct. to Friday 18th Oct., Samuel Yang from the Product Learning CoE team will be delivering this live session series of SAP Commerce Cloud System Administration. Each session will be 2 hrs, 9:00 ~ 11:00 am SGT time or 6:00 ~ 8:00 pm PDT time. TTY 🙂

Hi,

I've checked SAP note https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2985325 and it looks like it doesn't work anymore.

Is it possible to download Payment advice XML data? Since I can't see the overall data, I can't map the correct fields.

Cheers,

Tri

entry.title: Re: Setting "Reason&&" for Cancellation in Service Contract
entry.content: here is the CIP from other customers, you could just vote for your customer

entry.title: Re: Setting "Reason&&" for Cancellation in Service Contract
entry.content: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/326322/?section=sectionVotes

entry.title: Re: Web Dispatcher 6.40 connection to WAS logon group (SMLG)
entry.content:
If you're aim is to exclude one or more application servers from the WebDispatcher then it's probably easiest to set parameter wdisp/server_0= NAME=INSTANCE1, ACTIVE=0 in the instance profile of the web dispatcher.

See note 2103493 - How to deactivate a backend instance in SAP Web Dispatcher permanently 

Intuitively you would expect to use logon groups for this, but that it seems to be covered by this parameter instead.

entry.title: Re: Settlement to AUC is showing wrong values
entry.content: The level 5 is directly setting to the AUC in this case

entry.title: Re: From ECC to S/4HANA Public Cloud Refactor (“Re-architect”)
entry.content: Agreed with above procedure, that is good plan.

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict Offer Letter Generation without Completing Offer Approval
entry.content:
Hi @anan_jayghosh,

The business rule under 1 & 2 should include conditions if the Offer Status is Cancelled, Rejected apart from Completed.

There will be cases where Recruiters will need to move and park Candidates elsewhere to reject statuses for example of the Offer Approval is rejected or cancelled.

entry.title: How to mange and distribute fix in custom package to customers
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

We developed our custom ABAP packages under our namspace and implement it to our customer systems.

At the moment the way we are managing and distribute fix to our customer is manually by making local changes in customer dev systems. (Weekly collect & categorize issues in customer systems, make changes in our central dev system and distribute the same to other customer systems.. All those changes are now being managed on JIRA). But this method seems not efficiently when the number of customers inscrease more and more.

I would like to ask if any methodology/tool to manage and distribute our fix/update to the customer. What is the best practice can support that?

Hope to hearing from you..

Thank you,
Kenny

entry.title: Re: ESCUELA DE CONSULTORES SAP SUMMER 2024 🎓BY ERP4STUDENTS.LAT
entry.content: Genial

Hi @anan_jayghosh,

In the latest applicant workbench, the rule that defaults the Offer Approved field to null if Offer Status is not completed is showing some different behaviour


If recruiter tries to save it, there's an error message:

entry.title: Re: F-36 bill of exchange reference field updating with T...
entry.content: Hi Sumesh,

entry.title: Re: bgRFC Unit is stuck eventthough no failed/duimp happened.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

The issue has been fixed. Please find some potential solutions below: 

 - Make sure the destination & credential maintain in SBGRFCCONF is correct. (perform connection test in SM59 for that Destination)

 - Make sure below SAP Notes has installed:

https://me.sap.com/notes/2179044 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3226713 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2772500 

 - Check following below SAP Note 

https://me.sap.com/notes/3253640/E 

There are hundreds of incoming and outgoing HTTP connections and the connection limit (icm/max_conn) is sporadically reached: Transaction SMICM shows hundreds of connections and the traces show multiple snapshots for "Max ICM Connections reached". 

In addition there are H2 (HTTP/2) client connections that are not closed although they are open for more than a day.

entry.title: Re: SAP TechEd 2024 - Você já conhece as trilhas de conteúdos ?
entry.content: Excelente meu amigo @LuizSouzaCWB! Esse novo modelo do TechEd 2024 será sensacional, muito mais oportunidades para todos participarem.

entry.title: SAP Security Patch Day – October 2024
entry.content:
As SAP administrators and security professionals gear up for the second Tuesday of October 2024, anticipation builds for the latest SAP Security Patch Day. This essential event focuses on delivering critical security updates to address a range of vulnerabilities across various SAP products and components. Maintaining a strong security posture in SAP environments remains paramount, and this month’s patches underscore the ongoing commitment to safeguarding enterprise systems.

This month, 8 new security notes have been released, addressing vulnerabilities with CVSS scores ranging up to 9.8, indicating high-priority issues. These vulnerabilities impact a diverse set of SAP products, including the BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform, SAP Commerce Backoffice, SAP Enterprise Project Connection, and more.

Among the most notable vulnerabilities this month are:

  • CVE-2024-41730 in SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform with a CVSS score of 9.8, representing a critical missing authentication check that could allow unauthorized access to system tokens.
  • CVE-2024-37179 in SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform (Web Intelligence) with a CVSS score of 7.7, involving insecure file operations that permit authenticated users to download arbitrary files from the server.
  • CVE-2022-23302 in SAP Enterprise Project Connection with a CVSS score of 8.0, related to multiple vulnerabilities in the Spring Framework and Log4j libraries.
  • CVE-2024-45278 in SAP Commerce Backoffice with a CVSS score of 5.4, a Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that could compromise user sessions.
  • CVE-2024-45283 in SAP NetWeaver AS for Java (Destination Service) with a CVSS score of 6.0, an information disclosure vulnerability allowing unauthorized access to sensitive data.

Top 5 Vulnerabilities This Month

  1. CVE-2024-41730 – SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform

    • CVSS Score: 9.8
    • Type: Missing Authentication Check
    • Description: This critical vulnerability allows an unauthorized user to obtain a login token via a REST endpoint, potentially leading to full system compromise.
    • Recommendation: Immediately apply the relevant patches and update the Trusted_Auth_Shared_Secret property to Disabled in the specified configuration files. Restart the application servers as instructed in the SAP Security Note.

  2. CVE-2024-37179 – SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform (Web Intelligence)

    • CVSS Score: 7.7
    • Type: Insecure File Operations
    • Description: Authenticated users can exploit this vulnerability to download arbitrary files from the server, posing a significant risk to application confidentiality.
    • Recommendation: Apply the provided patch and create a PersonalFile_AllowList.txt file in the specified configuration directory, listing only trusted folders for data access.

       

  3. CVE-2022-23302 – SAP Enterprise Project Connection

    • CVSS Score: 8.0
    • Type: Multiple Vulnerabilities in Spring Framework and Log4j
    • Description: The use of vulnerable versions of Spring Framework and Log4j libraries could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code.
    • Recommendation: Update the affected libraries to the secure versions as outlined in the SAP Security Note and apply all related patches.

       

  4. CVE-2024-45278 – SAP Commerce Backoffice

    • CVSS Score: 5.4
    • Type: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
    • Description: Insufficient encoding of user inputs in the Backoffice component allows attackers to inject malicious scripts, potentially compromising user sessions.
    • Recommendation: Install the latest patches that enforce strict Content Security Policies (CSP) and ensure proper encoding of all user inputs.

       

  5. CVE-2024-45283 – SAP NetWeaver AS for Java (Destination Service)

    • CVSS Score: 6.0
    • Type: Information Disclosure
    • Description: This vulnerability enables authorized attackers to access sensitive information, including usernames and passwords, when creating RFC destinations.
    • Recommendation: Apply the security patches promptly and verify that all authorization settings are correctly configured to prevent unauthorized data access.

Complete Table of Patched Vulnerabilities

CVE Component Vulnerability Type CVSS

CVE-2024-41730SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence PlatformMissing Authentication Check9.8
CVE-2024-37179SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform (Web Intelligence)Insecure File Operations7.7
CVE-2022-23302SAP Enterprise Project ConnectionMultiple Vulnerabilities (Spring, Log4j)8.0
CVE-2024-45278SAP Commerce BackofficeCross-Site Scripting (XSS)5.4
CVE-2024-45283SAP NetWeaver AS for Java (Destination Service)Information Disclosure6.0
CVE-2024-45277SAP HANA ClientPrototype Pollution4.3
CVE-2024-47594SAP NetWeaver Enterprise Portal (KMC)Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)5.4
CVE-2024-37180SAP NetWeaver AS for ABAP and ABAP PlatformInformation DisclosureN/A

Detailed Vulnerability Insights

1. CVE-2024-41730 – SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence Platform

  • CVSS Score: 9.8 (Critical)
  • Description: An absence of authentication checks allows unauthorized users to obtain login tokens via a REST API, potentially leading to full system compromise. This poses severe risks to the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of sensitive data.
  • Solution: Apply the relevant patches immediately. Additionally, configure the Trusted_Auth_Shared_Secret property to Disabled in the specified configuration files located in the installation directories for both Windows and Linux environments. Restart the Tomcat server to enforce changes.

2. CVE-2024-37179 – SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform (Web Intelligence)

  • CVSS Score: 7.7
  • Description: This vulnerability allows authenticated users to download any file from the server hosting the Web Intelligence Reporting Server, severely impacting application confidentiality.
  • Solution: Install the patch provided in the SAP Security Note. To further restrict access, create a PersonalFile_AllowList.txt file in the configuration directory, listing only approved directories from which data can be fetched.

3. CVE-2022-23302 – SAP Enterprise Project Connection

  • CVSS Score: 8.0
  • Description: Multiple vulnerabilities in the Spring Framework and Log4j libraries used by SAP Enterprise Project Connection can be exploited to execute arbitrary code, compromising the application’s security.
  • Solution: Upgrade to the latest secure versions of Spring Framework and Log4j as detailed in the SAP Security Note. Apply all associated patches to mitigate these vulnerabilities.

4. CVE-2024-45278 – SAP Commerce Backoffice

  • CVSS Score: 5.4
  • Description: A Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in SAP Commerce Backoffice allows attackers to inject malicious scripts, which can compromise user sessions and data integrity.
  • Solution: Apply the latest security patches that enforce strict Content Security Policies (CSP) to prevent script execution. Ensure all user inputs are properly encoded to eliminate XSS risks.

5. CVE-2024-45283 – SAP NetWeaver AS for Java (Destination Service)

  • CVSS Score: 6.0
  • Description: This information disclosure vulnerability permits authorized attackers to access sensitive data, such as usernames and passwords, during the creation of RFC destinations.
  • Solution: Implement the provided patches promptly. Additionally, verify and adjust authorization settings to ensure that only authorized personnel can access sensitive information.

 

For those looking to deepen their understanding of SAP security, I'm also recommending an original online SAP Security Course based on BlackHat SAP Security Training. This comprehensive course covers core concepts and security administration, providing valuable insights for SAP professionals. You can find it here https://www.udemy.com/course/sap-security-core-concepts-and-security-administration/

entry.title: SAP B1 Installation - System Landscape Directory no responding
entry.content:
SAP Business One

Hello SAP Experts,

When I click “Next” at this stage, the setup stops responding.

I’m wondering what might be causing this issue.

I have already installed it once and had a little problem to installed components so I uninstalled and install it again then the problem show up, I guess there might be something wrong. However, I couldn’t find the problem. I would appreciate it if anyone has faced this problem before and knows how to fix it. Thanks.

Win11(HOME), Microsoft SQL Server 2019 (RTM) - 15.0.2000.5 (X64),SAP B1 10.00.250 FP 2405

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How to Pass parameter value from MD04 to custom tcode

Hello Raghavan, You can enter the Parameter ID as selection screen navigated transaction and you get it from Technical information under field data.

Also, you can enter the parameter value as Plant, Example mine case plant US01

Happy to help if anything needed.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Solution Order Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402
entry.content:

entry.title: Sap IBP testing
entry.content:
Hello All,

Our client is looking for automated testing in SAP IBP, please share your experience if you have performed the automated testing in your projects, like tools used, procedure, etc. There are 2 cases:

1. Can we use automated testing in SAP IBP rollouts, system is connected to SAP S/4HANA

2. Automated regression testing. One option is to utlize SAP testing functionality for quarterly upgrades, is there any other way to do automated testing?

Please let me know if you have used. Thanks in advance.

3421779 - How to add endpoints in Commerce Cloud 
3446165 - How to create private endpoint in commerce cloud

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Discovering SAP Global Trade Services, customs connection
entry.content:
As detailed in an article published by the International Monetary Fund, goods arriving in ports or leaving the country are first presented to, and recorded by, the customs authorities. They are then cleared through customs, which means a customs procedure (import for consumption, temporary import, export, and so on) is requested by the declarant through the filing of a customs declaration.

Customs then verify that the declaration is correct to ensure that all relevant entry or exit obligations are fulfilled. From there, your good can then proceed.

Filing of a customs declaration is therefore one of the key steps of the cross-border sales and purchasing processes:

For this, companies have 2 choices: going via a customs broker who will perform these duties on behalf of the company OR self-filing, in which case in-house customs specialists take care of the procedure themselves.

Even if most companies today chose the customs broker option, many will have at least considered pursuing a self-filing approach for the potential benefits that this could bring. Especially in today’s very competitive landscape where the more volume runs through one country, the higher the need for speed and automation. Which brings the self-filing option into focus.

Indeed, potential benefits of self-filing customs declarations can include:

 

Lower costs by reducing fees associated with using a customs broker

Increased flexibility by being able to file whenever ready, without depending on brokers’ resource scheduling

Reduced delays since any issue raised by the authorities is directly known to the organization who can take steps to resolve them quickly, potentially even before the shipment reaches its destination

Gain in visibility from what is required, how and when, also preventing miscommunications since there are no intermediaries in the chain

Own compliance and be in control. Here is a double edge sword though. The company will be fully liable for its filings so must always be up to date on upcoming changes initiated by national customs authorities. Getting this wrong could lead to significant financial and operational impacts

At least that’s the plan. But hiccups can occur, delaying or even blocking the process.

As per Supply Chain experts, typical reason for customs clearance blockages and delays mostly relate to:

 

Poor product description and/or classification

Missing or improper documentation (including certificates, etc.)

Incomplete information (values, addresses, etc.)

Unpaid taxes and duties

Not all these issues can be solved with technology of course, but many can. And here is where SAP Global Trade Services, customs connection enters the scene.

Until recently, the Cloud deployment of SAP Global Trade Services, edition for SAP HANA in private edition only supported the electronic submission of customs declarations through third parties, such as Seeburger Cloud or customs brokers, who can submit the declarations on behalf of the importer/exporter. This came with extra manual project efforts to be build this integration customer individually and with additional cost.

SAP Global Trade Services, customs connection has been introduced to fill this gap. It is a standardized public cloud based service providing simple and no-touch communication from SAP Global Trade Services edition for SAP HANA, private edition to customs authorities and/or customs brokers in supported countries:

Our partner, Seeburger, has provided this customs connectivity to SAP Global Trade Services customers both as an on-premise solution as well as in their own cloud offering for almost 20 years.

Since the solution and the partnership are proven, stable, and deliver value to SAP Global Trade Services customers, we have decided to take our partnership a step further and to provide this offering for private edition customers as well with standard SAP SLA support procedures.

With this new Cloud service, organizations will have parity, plus an opportunity for improvement, between SAP Global Trade Services, private edition and SAP Global Trade Services on-premise – enabling them to move to the Cloud with the same functional scope.

 

What’s in Scope?

 

Should you want to learn more about it, I would suggest having a look at the dedicated section of the SAP Help Portal: SAP Global Trade Services, customs connection | SAP Help Portal

Of course, self-filing is not a walk in the park and technology readiness is only one of the components for the decision making. There are definitely more considerations that need to be weighted accordingly:

  • Do you have the in-house expert and licensed resources not just for filing, but also for regulatory insights?
  • Do you already track cargo movements and coordinate with all parties (freight forwarders, transporters, warehouse, etc.) or is this currently done by a broker who may also be doing the filing?
  • Do you already have the right contacts within the industry and the authorities, or do you need to build your network?
  • Can you scale if the trade volume starts drastically increasing in a short period of time?
  • …

Nevertheless, self-filing can represent a significant source of advantage for companies ready to embark on this journey so it may be worth considering!

I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: Kanban label printing
entry.content:
Hello Oguzhan, I am hoping description is maintained in both language and you can check in MAKT-MAKTX. Also, while you are printing making sure, system language chosen as Turkish to get printed same.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Update custom form field via integration center
entry.content:
Hello @miriamdadone 

It should be possible using CPI.

Please check the blog Blog:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/how-can-we-run-end-end-performance-appraisal-process-using-odata-apis-in/ba-p/13375975

entry.title: Re: Percentage Based Dynamic Sample Size
entry.content:
Hello Dextor, Unfortunately there are no directly way to handle to below cases, however, you can handle it via sampling scheme based sample size also, you can have multiple inspection plan depends on lot quantity that you can enter the inspection plan header level. So that you can have different sampling plan as you need.

same query was raised almost close to decade back. Sample Size determination based on Lot Size Range - SAP Community 

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Adobe form to display blank value(space) for all records in the table for 0 for particular field
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: User principal certificate from trustworthy issuer is not leading to login session
entry.content: How is the logon sequence configured for the ICF node? For a quick test I tend to create an alias for /sap/bc/ping e.g. /sap/bc/ping_x509 and put the certificate on top.

entry.title: Re: Adobe form to display blank value(space) for all reco...
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please share the template (XDP) used in this. I can look into the template and see if we can achieve this

entry.title: Re: Initial value of 0FISCPER is replaced wrongly
entry.content:
how is  cv_bi_ma_i_o_0fiscper_001 variable populated?  As per my knowledge, empty value in 0FISCPER is treated as 0000000. I think its 7 zeros for YYYYMMM and not 6. 

Many of the standard code changes after upgrade so it's very tough to tell why it happened. May be something to do with standard conversion exit for 0FISCPER.

if you want quick fix, you should modify your ABAP exit logic to handle "0000000" as an initial or empty value along with "#". You can update the condition to treat both "0000000" and "#" as initial values, depending on your specific scenario.

Eg

* Treat both "#" and "0000000" as initial values
IF ls_var_range-low EQ '#'
OR ls_var_range-low EQ '0000000'
OR ls_var_range-low IS INITIAL.
lv_bool = 0.
ELSE.
lv_bool = 1.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Rental of equipments
entry.content:
Greetings,

that's more of an production planning topic than a plant maintenance one. You need to ask yourself how you are planning your day-to-day operations.

But in general I think you have two options:

  • define your construction equipment as PRT which you would assign to an operation of a production order
  • define your construction equipment as a work center and establish the connection between work center an equipment master data. Work center is then execution work center of the operation in the production order

Work centres have their capacity which can be evaluated and levelled in capacity planning processes which are are correlated to demand management etc.

Best regards, Matjaž

entry.title: Re: Calculated form rating & overall form rating should b...
entry.content:
Hi @Payas 

Using the proposed solution I don't think you will be able to track the rating changes.

I would suggest you have 2 goal sections and 2 goal plans.

1 for mid-year and 1 for year-end.

Regarding the Mid-Year rating.

You can build integration using IC push the mid-year ratings to a custom MDF and write a business rule to calculate the mid-year rating.

You can also pull the same MDF as a hyperlink in the form so that users can access the ratings while doing the year-end.

entry.title: Re: If 261 is not done for all components, 101 should not...
entry.content:
Hello John, By considering flexible supply chain process, SAP has designed to allow Goods receipts 101 irrespective 261 goods issue, Like supply Material would be reached at plant but invoice will be sent to other location (Head office) or there is a some issue in supplier invoice and takes sometimes to correct but you can still run your manufacturing process to ensure seamless process. If you still need it to be restricted, you can write own logic by getting relevant BAdi from google.

happy to help if you need more.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Get competencies from form
entry.content:
Hi @ThomasLecluyse 

You should able to achieve this using the below APIs:

Performance and Goals (PM/GM)>FormCompetencySection>FormCompetency
